Jordan Lee
San Francisco, CA

SUMMARY
Operations coordinator with 6 years of experience in logistics, customer service, and
community outreach. Bilingual in English and Spanish. Comfortable driving a delivery
route, managing volunteer schedules, and working directly with the public.

EXPERIENCE
Operations Coordinator, Bay Area Logistics Co. (2020-Present)
- Managed daily delivery routes and driver scheduling for a 12-vehicle fleet.
- Coordinated with community partners on food and supply distribution logistics.
- Trained new staff on customer service and conflict resolution.

Volunteer Program Assistant, Neighborhood Outreach Center (2018-2020)
- Organized weekend volunteer shifts for a neighborhood food pantry.
- Provided Spanish-English translation support for walk-in visitors.
- Assisted with event planning for community fundraising drives.

SKILLS
Driving, logistics, customer service, event planning, translation, Spanish,
organization, communication, team leadership, first aid certified.

CAUSES I CARE ABOUT
Food security, immigrant support, community safety.
